nasb.text: But Aaron and his sons offered on the altar of burnt offering and on the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

esv.text: But Aaron and his sons made offerings on the altar of burnt offering and on the altar of incense for all the work of the Most Holy Place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

cnv.text: 亞倫和他的子孫，卻在燔祭壇上和香壇上，獻祭燒香，作至聖所裡的各種工作，為以色列人贖罪，是完全照著　神的僕人摩西所吩咐的。

ccb.text: 亚伦和他的后代在祭坛和香坛上献祭烧香，负责至圣所里的各种工作，为以色列人赎罪，正如上帝的仆人摩西的吩咐。
